news.title:
GMDC shares surged 18.2% to a 52-week high of ₹736, driven by metal sector rally.
Hindalco, Vedanta, Hindustan Zinc, and others gained 2-3%, boosting overall sentiment.
news.summary:
GMDC shares surged 18.2% to a 52-week high of ₹736, driven by metal sector rally.
Hindalco, Vedanta, Hindustan Zinc, and others gained 2-3%, boosting overall sentiment.

news.title:
Kotak upgrades NALCO, Hindalco; Vedanta remains top pick amid rising aluminium prices.
Supply disruptions may tighten global aluminium inventory; Kotak revises FY2027/28 price forecasts.
news.summary:
Kotak upgrades NALCO, Hindalco; Vedanta remains top pick amid rising aluminium prices.

news.title:
Chhattisgarh CM orders inquiry into Vedanta power plant blast killing 20.
The incident raises concerns over safety protocols at Vedanta's facility.
news.summary:
Chhattisgarh CM orders inquiry into Vedanta power plant blast killing 20.
The incident raises concerns over safety protocols at Vedanta's facility.

news.title:
Vedanta challenges Adani's Jaiprakash bid by approaching NCLAT.
SC places key decisions related to the matter on hold.
news.summary:
Vedanta challenges Adani's Jaiprakash bid by approaching NCLAT.
SC places key decisions related to the matter on hold.

news.title:
Analysts recommend Eternal, Power Grid, Kotak Bank, Pine Labs, and Vedanta for April 16, 2026.
Focus spans energy, private banking, metals, and tech sectors; targets set based on technical analysis.
news.summary:
Analysts recommend Eternal, Power Grid, Kotak Bank, Pine Labs, and Vedanta for April 16, 2026.

news.title:
Vedanta Q4 EBITDA may rise 50-60% YoY on strong commodity tailwinds.
Improved cost dynamics, higher aluminium, zinc, silver prices to boost margins.
news.summary:
Vedanta Q4 EBITDA may rise 50-60% YoY on strong commodity tailwinds.

news.title: Lakshya Powertech wins a ₹642 crore O&M contract from Vedanta.
news.summary: Lakshya Powertech wins a ₹642 crore O&M contract from Vedanta.

news.title:
Vedanta shuts 600 MW coal plant in Chhattisgarh after boiler explosion.
Operations halted as situation is assessed and remediation work begins.
news.summary:
Vedanta shuts 600 MW coal plant in Chhattisgarh after boiler explosion.

news.title:
West Asia tensions drive aluminium prices up; LME aluminium surged 6% to $3,687/tonne.
JPMorgan, HSBC bullish on Hindalco, Vedanta; supply disruptions to push prices higher.
news.summary:
West Asia tensions drive aluminium prices up; LME aluminium surged 6% to $3,687/tonne.

news.title:
Vedanta gains over 1% after a boiler explosion at one of its units.
Hindalco sees gains driven by rising aluminum prices.
news.summary:

news.title:
LIC to issue bonus equity shares in 1:1 ratio; Vedanta faces operational scrutiny after boiler accident.
Adani Energy commissions 1,000 MW HVDC link; Mindspace REIT acquires Radial IT Park for ₹3,000 crore.
news.summary:

Incident reported by government official; details remain limited.

news.title:
Vedanta reports an incident at Athena Power plant, affecting 24 subcontractor workers, with 10 fatalities.
Company prioritizes medical aid, extends support, and initiates detailed investigation into the matter.
news.summary:

news.title:
Vedanta power plant boiler explosion in Sakti caused 9 deaths, 15 injuries.
Chhattisgarh CM termed the incident deeply distressing, per district SP.
news.summary:

news.title:
NCLAT adjourns hearing on Vedanta's plea against Adani's bid for JAL.
Hearing delayed due to change in bench composition after member's unavailability.
news.summary:
NCLAT adjourns hearing on Vedanta's plea against Adani's bid for JAL.

news.title:
Vedanta questions lenders' evaluation metrics for selecting Adani's ₹3,400 cr bid for JAL.
Vedanta argued before NCLAT that CoC's valuation undermines commercial wisdom in the process.
news.summary:

news.title:
SC declines to stay Adani Enterprises' resolution plan for Jaiprakash Associates.
Vedanta seeks NCLAT approval for major decisions by the monitoring committee.

news.title:
